theme: Do you think a university degree is still necessar

sentences.english: Do you think a university degree is still necessary or can people succeed through self-learning?
sentences.korean: 대학 학위가 여전히 필요합니까 아니면 독학으로 성공할 수 있습니까?

sentences.english: I think a university degree is still valuable but it's no longer the only path to success.
sentences.korean: 대학 학위가 여전히 가치 있지만 더 이상 성공의 유일한 경로는 아니라고 생각해요.

sentences.english: For fields like medicine law and engineering a formal degree is absolutely essential because these professions require rigorous standardized training.
sentences.korean: 의학 법학 공학 같은 분야에서는 정식 학위가 절대적으로 필수적이에요. 엄격한 표준화된 교육이 필요한 직업이니까요.

sentences.english: However in tech and creative fields many successful people have proven that skills matter more than diplomas.
sentences.korean: 하지만 기술과 창작 분야에서는 많은 성공한 사람이 졸업장보다 기술이 중요하다는 것을 증명했어요.

sentences.english: The key advantage of self-learning is that you can focus on exactly what you need and learn at your own pace.
sentences.korean: 독학의 핵심 장점은 필요한 것에 정확히 집중하고 자기 속도로 배울 수 있다는 거예요.

sentences.english: But what a university offers beyond knowledge — a network of peers mentors and structured discipline — is hard to replicate on your own.
sentences.korean: 하지만 대학이 지식 너머 제공하는 것 — 동료 멘토 네트워크와 체계적 규율 — 은 혼자서 재현하기 어려워요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Do you think a university degree is still necessar
Long Commute vs. Small Apartment Near Work
